explanation: Reordered the command-line arguments from '/LOGON /STARTUP' to '/LOGON /startup' to test case sensitivity and reordering as a safe mutation technique.
Inserted quotes and spaces around the /logon and /startup flags to test parsing behavior while maintaining the same functionality.
Substituted '/' with '-' for the command-line flags to test if the binary accepts alternative syntax for the same behavior.
Omitted the '/startup' flag to test if the detection relies on both flags and if partial command lines can bypass it.
Original command line used as a baseline for comparison in the test environment.
